parameters.query:
SELECT EXISTS(
  SELECT 1
  FROM public.message_events me
  WHERE me.channel = 'INSTAGRAM'
    AND me.provider = 'META'
    AND me.provider_message_id = {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_message_id) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_message_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}
  LIMIT 1
) AS is_duplicate

SELECT *
FROM public.resolve_conversation_entities(
  'INSTAGRAM',
  'META',
  {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.external_user_id) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.external_user_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.channel_account_id) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.channel_account_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.external_display_name || 'Instagram Lead') == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.external_display_name || 'Instagram Lead').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  NULL,
  NULL
)

WITH event_insert AS (
  SELECT public.append_message_event(
    {{ ($json.thread_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.thread_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }},
    {{ ($json.contact_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.contact_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }},
    'INSTAGRAM',
    'META',
    'INBOUND',
    'LEAD',
    'MESSAGE',
    {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.message_type) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.message_type).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_message_id) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_message_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_parent_message_id) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_parent_message_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ (('ig:' + $node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_message_id)) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String('ig:' + $node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.provider_message_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.text_body || '') == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.text_body || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.normalized_text || '') == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.normalized_text || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.media_url) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.media_url).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'RECEIVED',
    'PROCESSED',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    {{ "'" + JSON.stringify(($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.raw_payload || {}) || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" }},
    NULL,
    {{ ($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.received_at) == null ? 'NULL::timestamptz' : "'" + String($node["Parse Instagram Event"].json.received_at).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::timestamptz" }}
  ) AS event_id
), lead_sync AS (
  SELECT public.sync_contact_to_outreach_lead({{ ($json.contact_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.contact_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}, {{ ($json.contact_channel_identity_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.contact_channel_identity_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}, 'IN_CONVERSATION', 'INSTAGRAM', NULL, NULL, true) AS lead_id
), inbound_log AS (
  SELECT public.sync_message_event_to_outreach_log((SELECT event_id FROM event_insert), (SELECT lead_id FROM lead_sync), 'INBOUND_MESSAGE') AS log_id
)
SELECT
  (SELECT event_id FROM event_insert) AS event_id,
  (SELECT lead_id FROM lead_sync) AS lead_id,
  (SELECT log_id FROM inbound_log) AS inbound_log_id,
  {{ ($json.contact_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.contact_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }} AS contact_id,
  {{ ($json.thread_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.thread_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }} AS thread_id,
  {{ ($json.contact_channel_identity_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.contact_channel_identity_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }} AS identity_id,
  COALESCE((SELECT c.ai_engagement_score FROM public.contacts c WHERE c.id = {{ ($json.contact_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.contact_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}), 0) AS ai_engagement_score

UPDATE public.contacts c
   SET lifecycle_status = 'IN_CONVERSATION',
       source = COALESCE(c.source, 'INBOUND_IG'),
       conversation_stage = COALESCE(c.conversation_stage, 'INTRO'),
       bot_enabled = true,
       next_followup_at = NULL,
       updated_at = NOW()
 WHERE c.id = {{ ($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.contact_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.contact_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}
 RETURNING c.id

SELECT
  t.human_handoff,
  coalesce(cci.is_opted_out, false) AS is_opted_out,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM public.message_events me
    WHERE me.thread_id = t.id
      AND me.direction = 'OUTBOUND'
      AND me.actor = 'BOT'
      AND me.created_at > coalesce((SELECT max(me2.created_at) FROM public.message_events me2 WHERE me2.thread_id = t.id AND me2.direction = 'INBOUND'), to_timestamp(0))
  ) AS consecutive_bot_outbound,
  (
    SELECT max(me.created_at)
    FROM public.message_events me
    WHERE me.thread_id = t.id
      AND me.direction = 'INBOUND'
  ) AS last_inbound_at
FROM public.threads t
JOIN public.contact_channel_identities cci ON cci.id = {{ ($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.identity_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.identity_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}
WHERE t.id = {{ ($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.thread_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.thread_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN me.direction = 'INBOUND' THEN 'LEAD'
    WHEN me.actor = 'BOT' THEN 'BOT'
    WHEN me.actor = 'HUMAN' THEN 'HUMAN'
    ELSE me.direction
  END AS direction,
  COALESCE(me.normalized_text, me.text_body, me.provider_message_id, '[sin texto]') AS message_text,
  me.created_at
FROM public.message_events me
WHERE me.thread_id = {{ ($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.thread_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.thread_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}
ORDER BY me.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT key, segment, stage, type, title, content, priority, topic
FROM nv_playbook
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY priority ASC

parameters.jsCode:
const playbook = $input.first().json || [];
const playbookArr = Array.isArray(playbook) ? playbook : [];
const sections = playbookArr.sort((a, b) => (a.priority || 0) - (b.priority || 0)).map(p => `### ${p.title}
${p.content}`).join('

');
const systemPrompt = `Sos NovaBot, asistente de NovaVision para Instagram DM.

REGLAS ABSOLUTAS:
1. Responder siempre en español argentino, corto, claro, natural y sin tono de vendedor agresivo.
2. Usá FAQ_CONTEXT como fuente prioritaria para planes, precios, onboarding y funcionalidades cuando venga con matches; si FAQ_CONTEXT está vacío, apoyate en PLAYBOOK.
3. No inventar precios, promociones, rubro ni contexto que el lead no haya dicho. Si FAQ_CONTEXT trae montos públicos, podés citarlos textual.
4. No repreguntar datos que el lead ya compartió en el historial.
5. Si ya hubo mensajes del bot, no te vuelvas a presentar, no saludes de nuevo y no repitas la misma idea ni el mismo CTA.
6. Mantener mensajes aptos para DM, máximo 300 caracteres.
7. Evitá frases vacías como “te ayudo a crecer” o “mejorá tus ventas” si no las aterrizás en algo concreto. Cuando aporte, mencioná 1 o 2 resultados reales de NovaVision: tienda propia, catálogo claro, compra sin escribir por todo, cobros integrados, pedidos más ordenados o mejor imagen profesional.
8. En mensajes iniciales o cuando el lead pide info general al arrancar, incluí de forma natural este CTA: https://novavision.lat/builder y aclarale que ahí puede crear su tienda online en minutos.
9. Si el lead pregunta precio, costo, tarifa o cuánto sale, respondé directo. Si FAQ_CONTEXT tiene precios públicos, darlos sin rodeos y sumar https://novavision.lat/precios. Nunca mandes solo al builder ante una pregunta de precio.
10. Si el lead responde con una afirmación corta como “si”, “dale”, “ok”, “mandame” o “pasame”, cumplí exactamente lo último que ofreció el bot en vez de reiniciar la conversación o volver a preguntar lo mismo.
11. Si el historial ya muestra que compartiste el builder, no lo repitas salvo que el lead pida dónde crear la tienda o quiera avanzar.
12. Si el lead pide humano o demo, priorizá invitar a https://novavision.lat/lead y marcá should_notify_sales=true.
13. Usá el historial para no repetir textual el último mensaje del bot. Cada reply tiene que aportar algo nuevo: una aclaración útil, un beneficio concreto o un siguiente paso claro.
14. Si el lead escribe algo genérico, no respondas genérico: conectá con NovaVision explicando en una frase qué resuelve y cerrá con una pregunta útil.

FORMATO JSON OBLIGATORIO:
{
  "reply": "texto",
  "engagement_delta": -10 a 20,
  "conversation_stage": "INTRO|DISCOVERY|FOLLOWUP|CLOSING|DEMO_OFFERED|DEMO_BOOKED",
  "intent": "interested|curious|objection|not_interested|spam|human_request",
  "should_notify_sales": true/false,
  "reasoning": "explicacion interna"
}

PLAYBOOK:
${sections || '(sin playbook)'}`;
return [{ json: { system_prompt: systemPrompt } }];

parameters.query:
WITH contact_update AS (
  UPDATE public.contacts c
     SET ai_engagement_score = {{ $json.new_score }},
         conversation_stage = {{ ($json.new_stage) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.new_stage).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
         hot_lead = {{ $json.is_hot }},
         ai_state = COALESCE(c.ai_state, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('intent', {{ ($json.intent) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.intent).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}, 'score', {{ $json.new_score }}, 'stage', {{ ($json.new_stage) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.new_stage).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}, 'reasoning', {{ ($json.reasoning) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.reasoning).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}),
         updated_at = NOW()
   WHERE c.id = {{ ($json.contact_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.contact_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}
   RETURNING c.id
)
SELECT public.sync_contact_to_outreach_lead({{ ($json.contact_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.contact_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}, {{ ($json.identity_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($json.identity_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }}, 'IN_CONVERSATION', 'INSTAGRAM', NULL, NULL, true) AS id

WITH event_insert AS (
  SELECT public.append_message_event(
    {{ ($node["Post-process AI"].json.thread_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($node["Post-process AI"].json.thread_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }},
    {{ ($node["Post-process AI"].json.contact_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($node["Post-process AI"].json.contact_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }},
    'INSTAGRAM',
    'META',
    'OUTBOUND',
    'BOT',
    'MESSAGE',
    'TEXT',
    {{ ($json.message_id || '') == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.message_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    NULL,
    {{ (($json.message_id ? 'ig-bot:' + $json.message_id : null)) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(($json.message_id ? 'ig-bot:' + $json.message_id : null)).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ ($node["Post-process AI"].json.reply) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Post-process AI"].json.reply).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    {{ ($node["Post-process AI"].json.reply) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Post-process AI"].json.reply).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    NULL,
    'SENT',
    'PROCESSED',
    NULL,
    NULL,
    jsonb_build_object('intent', {{ ($node["Post-process AI"].json.intent) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Post-process AI"].json.intent).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}, 'score', {{ $node["Post-process AI"].json.new_score }}, 'stage', {{ ($node["Post-process AI"].json.new_stage) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($node["Post-process AI"].json.new_stage).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}),
    NOW(),
    NULL
  ) AS event_id
)
SELECT public.sync_message_event_to_outreach_log((SELECT event_id FROM event_insert), {{ ($node["Post-process AI"].json.lead_id) == null ? 'NULL::bigint' : String($node["Post-process AI"].json.lead_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + '::bigint' }}, 'BOT_REPLY') AS id

INSERT INTO public.compliance_events (
  thread_id,
  contact_id,
  channel,
  provider,
  compliance_type,
  reason,
  payload,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  {{ ($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.thread_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.thread_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }},
  {{ ($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.contact_id) == null ? 'NULL::uuid' : "'" + String($node["Append Inbound Event"].json.contact_id).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::uuid" }},
  'INSTAGRAM',
  'META',
  CASE {{ ($json.blocked_by) == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.blocked_by).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}
    WHEN 'opt_out' THEN 'OPT_OUT'
    WHEN 'outside_24h_window' THEN 'WINDOW_BLOCK'
    WHEN 'too_many_bot_outbound' THEN 'RATE_LIMIT_BLOCK'
    ELSE 'MANUAL_REVIEW'
  END,
  {{ ($json.blocked_by || 'blocked') == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.blocked_by || 'blocked').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }},
  jsonb_build_object('workflow', 'ig-inbound', 'blocked_by', {{ ($json.blocked_by || 'blocked') == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String($json.blocked_by || 'blocked').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" }}),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id
